verses.latin_vulgate: Domine Deus meus, in te speravi ;  salvum me fac ex omnibus persequentibus me, et libera me :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יְהֹוָ֣ה אֱ֭לֹהַי בְּךָ֣ חָסִ֑יתִי הוֹשִׁיעֵ֥נִי מִכׇּל־רֹ֝דְפַ֗י וְהַצִּילֵֽנִי׃
verses.douay_rheims: O Lord, my God, in thee have I put my trust; save me from all them that persecute me, and deliver me.
verses.finnish_biblia: Davidin viattomuus, josta hän Herralle veisasi, Kuusin Jeminin pojan sanan tähden: (H 7:2) Sinuun, Herra minun Jumalani, minä uskallan: auta minua kaikista minun vainollisistani, ja pelasta minua;
verses.king_james: O Lord my God, in thee do I put my trust: save me from all them that persecute me, and deliver me:

verses.latin_vulgate: nequando rapiat ut leo animam meam,  dum non est qui redimat, neque qui salvum faciat.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: פֶּן־יִטְרֹ֣ף כְּאַרְיֵ֣ה נַפְשִׁ֑י פֹּ֝רֵ֗ק וְאֵ֣ין מַצִּֽיל׃
verses.douay_rheims: Lest at any time he seize upon my soul like a lion, while there is no one to redeem me, nor to save.
verses.finnish_biblia: (H 7:3) Ettei he repisi minun sieluani niinkuin jalopeura, ja sätkisi ilman holhojaa.
verses.king_james: Lest he tear my soul like a lion, rending it in pieces, while there is none to deliver.

verses.latin_vulgate: Domine Deus meus, si feci istud,  si est iniquitas in manibus meis,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יְהֹוָ֣ה אֱ֭לֹהַי אִם־עָשִׂ֣יתִי זֹ֑את אִֽם־יֶשׁ־עָ֥וֶל בְּכַפָּֽי׃
verses.douay_rheims: O Lord, my God, if I have done this thing, if there be iniquity in my hands:
verses.finnish_biblia: (H 7:4) Herra minun Jumalani, jos minä sen tein ja jos vääryys on minun käsissäni;
verses.king_james: O Lord my God, if I have done this; if there be iniquity in my hands;

verses.latin_vulgate: si reddidi retribuentibus mihi mala,  decidam merito ab inimicis meis inanis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אִם־גָּ֭מַלְתִּי שֽׁוֹלְמִ֥י רָ֑ע וָאֲחַלְּצָ֖ה צֽוֹרְרִ֣י רֵיקָֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: If I have rendered to them that repaid me evils, let me deservedly fall empty before my enemies.
verses.finnish_biblia: (H 7:5) Jos minä pahalla kostanut olen niille, jotka minun kanssani rauhassa elivät; vaan minä olen niitä pelastanut, jotka ilman syytä minua vihasivat;
verses.king_james: If I have rewarded evil unto him that was at peace with me; (yea, I have delivered him that without cause is mine enemy:)

verses.latin_vulgate: Persequatur inimicus animam meam, et comprehendat ;  et conculcet in terra vitam meam,  et gloriam meam in pulverem deducat.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יִ֥רַדֹּֽף־אוֹיֵ֨ב ׀ נַפְשִׁ֡י וְיַשֵּׂ֗ג וְיִרְמֹ֣ס לָאָ֣רֶץ חַיָּ֑י וּכְבוֹדִ֓י ׀ לֶעָפָ֖ר יַשְׁכֵּ֣ן סֶֽלָה׃
verses.douay_rheims: Let the enemy pursue my soul, and take it, and tread down my life, on the earth, and bring down my glory to the dust.
verses.finnish_biblia: (H 7:6) Niin vainotkaan viholliseni minun sieluani ja käsittäköön sen, ja poljeskelkaan maahan elämäni, ja painakaan kunniani tomuun, Sela!
verses.king_james: Let the enemy persecute my soul, and take it; yea, let him tread down my life upon the earth, and lay mine honour in the dust. Selah.

verses.latin_vulgate: Exsurge, Domine, in ira tua,  et exaltare in finibus inimicorum meorum :  et exsurge, Domine Deus meus, in præcepto quod mandasti,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: ק֘וּמָ֤ה יְהֹוָ֨ה ׀ בְּאַפֶּ֗ךָ הִ֭נָּשֵׂא בְּעַבְר֣וֹת צוֹרְרָ֑י וְע֥וּרָה אֵ֝לַ֗י מִשְׁפָּ֥ט צִוִּֽיתָ׃
verses.douay_rheims: Rise up, O Lord, in thy anger: and be thou exalted in the borders of my enemies. And arise, O Lord, my God, in the precept which thou hast commanded:
verses.finnish_biblia: (H 7:7) Nouse Herra vihassas, korota sinuas ylitse vihollisteni hirmuisuuden, heräjä minun puoleeni; sillä sinä olet käskenyt oikeuden,
verses.king_james: Arise, O Lord, in thine anger, lift up thyself because of the rage of mine enemies: and awake for me to the judgment that thou hast commanded.

verses.latin_vulgate: et synagoga populorum circumdabit te :  et propter hanc in altum regredere :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַעֲדַ֣ת לְ֭אֻמִּים תְּסֽוֹבְבֶ֑ךָּ וְ֝עָלֶ֗יהָ לַמָּר֥וֹם שֽׁוּבָה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And a congregation of people shall surround thee. And for their sakes return thou on high.
verses.finnish_biblia: (H 7:8) Että kansat kokoontuisivat jälleen sinun tykös; ja tule heidän tähtensä taas ylös,
verses.king_james: So shall the congregation of the people compass thee about: for their sakes therefore return thou on high.

verses.latin_vulgate: Dominus judicat populos.  Judica me, Domine, secundum justitiam meam,  et secundum innocentiam meam super me.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יְהֹוָה֮ יָדִ֢ין עַ֫מִּ֥ים שׇׁפְטֵ֥נִי יְהֹוָ֑ה כְּצִדְקִ֖י וּכְתֻמִּ֣י עָלָֽי׃
verses.douay_rheims: The Lord judgeth the people. Judge me, O Lord, according to my justice, and according to my innocence in me.
verses.finnish_biblia: (H 7:9) Herra on kansain tuomari: tuomitse Herra minua vanhurskauteni ja vakuuteni jälkeen.
verses.king_james: The Lord shall judge the people: judge me, O Lord, according to my righteousness, and according to mine integrity that is in me.

verses.latin_vulgate: Consumetur nequitia peccatorum, et diriges justum,  scrutans corda et renes, Deus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יִגְמׇר־נָ֬א רַ֨ע ׀ רְשָׁעִים֮ וּתְכוֹנֵ֢ן צַ֫דִּ֥יק וּבֹחֵ֣ן לִ֭בּוֹת וּכְלָי֗וֹת אֱלֹהִ֥ים צַדִּֽיק׃
verses.douay_rheims: The wickedness of sinners shall be brought to nought; and thou shalt direct the just: the searcher of hearts and reins is God. Just
verses.finnish_biblia: (H 7:10) Loppukoon jumalattomain pahuus, ja holho vanhurskaita; sillä sinä, vanhurskas Jumala, tutkit sydämet ja munaskuut.
verses.king_james: Oh let the wickedness of the wicked come to an end; but establish the just: for the righteous God trieth the hearts and reins.

verses.latin_vulgate: Justum adjutorium meum a Domino,  qui salvos facit rectos corde.
verses.douay_rheims: Is my help from the Lord; who saveth the upright of heart.
verses.finnish_biblia: (H 7:11) Minun kilpeni on Jumalan tykönä, joka vaat sydämet auttaa.
verses.king_james: My defence is of God, which saveth the upright in heart.

verses.latin_vulgate: Deus judex justus, fortis, et patiens ;  numquid irascitur per singulos dies ?
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֱ֭לֹהִים שׁוֹפֵ֣ט צַדִּ֑יק וְ֝אֵ֗ל זֹעֵ֥ם בְּכׇל־יֽוֹם׃
verses.douay_rheims: God is a just judge, strong and patient: is he angry every day?
verses.finnish_biblia: (H 7:12) Jumala on oikia tuomari; ja Jumala, joka joka päivä uhkaa.
verses.king_james: God judgeth the righteous, and God is angry with the wicked every day.

verses.latin_vulgate: Nisi conversi fueritis, gladium suum vibrabit ;  arcum suum tetendit, et paravit illum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אִם־לֹ֣א יָ֭שׁוּב חַרְבּ֣וֹ יִלְט֑וֹשׁ קַשְׁתּ֥וֹ דָ֝רַ֗ךְ וַֽיְכוֹנְנֶֽהָ׃
verses.douay_rheims: Except you will be converted, he will brandish his sword; he hath bent his bow, and made it ready.
verses.finnish_biblia: (H 7:13) Ellei he palaja, niin hän on miekkansa teroittanut, joutsensa jännittänyt, ja tarkoittaa,
verses.king_james: If he turn not, he will whet his sword; he hath bent his bow, and made it ready.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et in eo paravit vasa mortis,  sagittas suas ardentibus effecit.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְ֭לוֹ הֵכִ֣ין כְּלֵי־מָ֑וֶת חִ֝צָּ֗יו לְֽדֹלְקִ֥ים יִפְעָֽל׃
verses.douay_rheims: And in it he hath prepared to instruments of death, he hath made ready his arrows for them that burn.
verses.finnish_biblia: (H 7:14) Ja on pannut sen päälle surmannuolet; hän on valmistanut vasamansa kadottamaan.
verses.king_james: He hath also prepared for him the instruments of death; he ordaineth his arrows against the persecutors.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ecce parturiit injustitiam ;  concepit dolorem, et peperit iniquitatem.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הִנֵּ֥ה יְחַבֶּל־אָ֑וֶן וְהָרָ֥ה עָ֝מָ֗ל וְיָ֣לַד שָֽׁקֶר׃
verses.douay_rheims: Behold he hath been in labour with injustice: he hath conceived sorrow, and brought forth iniquity.
verses.finnish_biblia: (H 7:15) Katso, hänellä on pahaa mielessä: hän on onnettomuutta raskas, mutta hän synnyttää puuttumisen.
verses.king_james: Behold, he travaileth with iniquity, and hath conceived mischief, and brought forth falsehood.

verses.latin_vulgate: Lacum aperuit, et effodit eum ;  et incidit in foveam quam fecit.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בּ֣וֹר כָּ֭רָה וַֽיַּחְפְּרֵ֑הוּ וַ֝יִּפֹּ֗ל בְּשַׁ֣חַת יִפְעָֽל׃
verses.douay_rheims: He hath opened a pit and dug it: and he is fallen into the hole he made.
verses.finnish_biblia: (H 7:16) Hän kaivoi haudan ja valmisti, ja on kaatunut siihen kuoppaan, jonka hän oli tehnyt.
verses.king_james: He made a pit, and digged it, and is fallen into the ditch which he made.

verses.latin_vulgate: Convertetur dolor ejus in caput ejus,  et in verticem ipsius iniquitas ejus descendet.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יָשׁ֣וּב עֲמָל֣וֹ בְרֹאשׁ֑וֹ וְעַ֥ל קׇ֝דְקֳד֗וֹ חֲמָס֥וֹ יֵרֵֽד׃
verses.douay_rheims: His sorrow shall be turned on his own head: and his iniquity shall come down upon his crown.
verses.finnish_biblia: (H 7:17) Hänen onnettomuutensa pitää hänen päänsä päälle tuleman, ja hänen vääryytensä pitää hänen päänsä laelle lankeeman.
verses.king_james: His mischief shall return upon his own head, and his violent dealing shall come down upon his own pate.

verses.latin_vulgate: Confitebor Domino secundum justitiam ejus,  et psallam nomini Domini altissimi.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אוֹדֶ֣ה יְהֹוָ֣ה כְּצִדְק֑וֹ וַ֝אֲזַמְּרָ֗ה שֵֽׁם־יְהֹוָ֥ה עֶלְיֽוֹן׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: I will give glory to the Lord according to his justice: and will sing to the name of the Lord the most high.
verses.finnish_biblia: (H 7:18) Minä kiitän Herraa hänen vanhurskautensa tähden, ja kunnioitan ylimmäisen Herran nimeä.
verses.king_james: I will praise the Lord according to his righteousness: and will sing praise to the name of the Lord most high.
